2fa_description_disabled: Protect your account by enabling two-factor authentication. You will require a code from your authentication app every time you log in.
2fa_description_enabled: Two-factor authentication is enabled on your account, providing an extra layer of security.
2fa_disable_prompt: To disable two-factor authentication, please enter your current password.
2fa_setup_scan: Scan this QR code with your authentication app (e.g., Google Authenticator).
email_security_note: Sends a welcome email. For security, the password is NOT included (you must communicate it via another channel).
password_help_temp: Be sure to copy the password before saving.
password_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
password_lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
password_number: Password must contain at least one number
password_special: Password must contain at least one special character
password_uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
title: My Profile
